channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Sunken paving slab is trip hazard, 17th March
item.description:
Outside a pedestrian gate, West Heath Avenue NW11 7QP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Heath Avenue, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 17th March
item.description:
Appeared over weekend March 14/15

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Freelands Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in road, 17th March
item.description:
Many potholes in road that can cause serious damage on vehicles

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 street lights are out and have been for months, 17th March
item.description:
No street lighting in this area more than 4 street lights out
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pitfield Crescent, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Teighmouth road, 17th March
item.description:
My car went in the pothole my tyres got damaged my allow wheel got bent and my suspension dropped made a big impact on my vehicle currently got my car towed to a garage and will get a damage report asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mapesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard light not working, 17th March
item.description:
Bollard light not working as shown my arrow in photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copers Cope Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of black bags and random rubbish, 16th March
item.description:
Looks horrible and is rude

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alvey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove Along Wall of Joe the Juice shop (opposite the car wash)-Flytipping-2nd complaint, 16th March
item.description:
2nd Complaint-Shopping basket fly tipped here and still not removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (next to car wash on the other side)-Flytipping-2nd complaint, 16th March
item.description:
2nd complaint-Chair and cone flytipped in this area. The items do not belong here and it will encourage more dumping, as around close areas it frequently happens. They need to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ashbourne Grove (in front if The Neighbourhood Vet)-Road sign down, 16th March
item.description:
Road sign is down broken from the foundation. Obstructing the pavement for pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Ashbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped garden waste bin, 16th March
item.description:
Garden bin filled with soil has been dumped on the pavement. It’s been sitting there for couple weeks now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milton Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on pavement and kerb side, 16th March
item.description:
There’s a huge amount of litter both on the pavement and at the kerbside which needs to be cleared. It’s been present for some time now and we haven’t had the road cleaned for a long time. Please could a thorough clean take place, including at the kerb.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked paving slabs along 48-40 Sundridge Avenue, 16th March
item.description:
These have been damaged for years and causing the children to trip when walking to/from school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked & uneven paving slabs along Ashmore Grove, 16th March
item.description:
The stretch between 78 - 84 Ashmore Grove is covered in cracked paving slabs. This stretch receives high footfall as many children walk this way to the primary school. It's been a trip hazard for months, probably years.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashmore Grove, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 16th March
item.description:
Fly Tipping has been there for over a month
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Hoddesdon Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dropped / Broken drain, 16th March
item.description:
Dropped / broken drain at the entrance of Eugenie mews. It is dragged the cobblestones don from the entrance of Eugenie Mews. I’m concerned if it was to get worse it could create a deep hole that will affect the road itself.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eugenie Mews, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree covering windows and getting tangled in wires, 16th March
item.description:
The tree on Mill Place in between 44 Mill Place and 2 Eugenie Mews is in urgent need of pruning, or even removing. The branches are directly touching the windows of 2 Eugenie Mews and are regularly getting tangled up with overhead wires which also now touch the windows of 2 Eugenie Mews. This has been going on for well over a year and needs looking at ASAP before the tree becomes overgrown.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Place, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling all up the street, 16th March
item.description:
Multiple dog mess all up the street and corner of Maze Hill and Park Vista
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maze Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all up the street, 16th March
item.description:
Foxes are having a field day!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mell Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Middle of the road outside the Devonshire Pub, 16th March
item.description:
These potholes are huge and dangerous. They have been there for months and have gotten to the point they are now really dangerous. The whole road surface has failed. A patch will not do. You must resurface the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Hawley Crescent, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
